fixes: Changes uptime check to send a ping to a URL rather than receiving a ping to be ablke to close unnecessary open ports and reduce attack surface.
Fixed get_race_end_time fucntion to actualy allow for scoring of completed races rather than just skipping over to the next race repeatedly.
Added fix to also display Sprint results in the 'Race scored' message on Sprint weekends.
Fixed error when specifically selecting current race in /view_predictions command.
Fixed Sprint Pole returning incorrect value from FastF1.
Cleaned up cache cleaning system by implementing cache cleaning in a 'finally' block outside the 'try'.

features: Added mod command to show Top 10 publicly
Added mod command to rescore all finished races.
Added ability to view past races in /view_predictions.
Added feature to view correct bold predictions of a server.
Added different tiers of difficulty for bold predictions.
